chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. S- 150 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge Haring of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 31-07-2023. Mr. Abdul Sami Kalhoro, Advocate along with petitioner No.1. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ******* 1. Deferred. 2. Petitioner No.1 is present with her counsel. After notice to the respondents No.1 to 4, respondent No.2 submitted his statement that the police officials never harassed the petitioners. The petitioners have submitted the copy of affidavit of freewill as Annex-A at page-21, copy of Nikahnama as Annex-A/1 at page-25 and order dated 08.04.2023 passed by ex-Officio Justice of Peace-II, Ghotki in Crl. Misc. Application No.845 of 2023, who issued directions to respondents No.2&3 to provide legal protection to petitioner No.1 as and when she approached to them. Counsel for the petitioners expressed his satisfaction that respondent No.2 be directed to keep strict watch upon the respondents No.5&6 as they used to harass the petitioners. Consequently, SIP-Asghar Ali, SHO P.S, Khanpur Mahar who also 2 appear on behalf of SSP, Ghotki is directed for the same. He is further directed to ensure the protection to the petitioners strictly in accordance with law. Consequently, with above directions instant petition stands disposed of. Copy of order be sent to SSP, Ghotki for compliance. J U D G E Ahmad
